name: Smart Sunset Lamp
description: A warm amber projection lamp with remote control. Point it at any wall and fill your room with the soft glow of a permanent golden hour. No app needed. Just light.

name: Quiet Desk Fan
description: A 3-in-1 desk fan, humidifier, and cooler. Multiple speeds, a built-in water tank for cool mist, and a night light. Moves the air without moving the silence.

name: 75% Mechanical Keyboard
description: Gasket-mounted, hot-swappable, wireless. PBT keycaps, pre-lubed linear switches, and a rotary knob. The sound of focus, engineered into every key.

name: Oversized Felt Desk Mat
description: Premium wool felt with a non-slip rubber base. 900 by 400mm. Dark, soft, and silent. Everything on your desk sits on this.

name: Wood Grain Aroma Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic mist diffuser with a dark wood grain finish and soft ambient glow. 300ml capacity, remote control, near-silent operation. Your room, scented.

name: USB Mug Warmer
description: A slim black warming pad that keeps your drink at the perfect temperature. USB powered, silent, always ready. The last sip is as warm as the first.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Aluminum light bar with five color temperatures. Clips to any monitor, lights your desk without touching your screen. Touch control, USB powered, zero glare.
